description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a dark metallic finish and angular contours. The body is robust, with a prominent upper receiver and a long, sharp-edged bayonet blade affixed beneath the barrel, giving it a menacing appearance. The grip is ergonomic and integrated into the lower receiver, with a trigger guard that is slightly elongated and rounded for finger protection. The stock is compact and appears reinforced, suitable for close-quarters use. Subtle red accents and small illuminated details are visible along the receiver, adding to its high-tech aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, optimized for durability and performance in urban environments.
description: A dark, futuristic shotgun with a long bayonet blade, angular body, and compact reinforced stock, featuring red accents and an ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the prominent bayonet blade, and the detailed receiver with red accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sharp bayonet tip and the narrow, angular profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mirrored features of the shotgun, including the bayonet and ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compact stock, the alignment of the barrel, and the handle's shape.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with an under-barrel bayonet; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated and rounded trigger guard, moderately sized, with smooth contours
